title: 'Don't want to look 20 pounds heavier': Trump jabs reports of wearing bulletproof vest during White House dinner attack
summary_full: President Trump dismissed reports of wearing a bulletproof vest, joking about the added weight. He acknowledged security considerations but expressed reluctance to appear overly protected. Trump stated he avoids dwelling on personal security threats to remain effective in his duties, following an attempted assassination at a White House event.
